arts.sum: While giant killings are part and parcel of cup competitions in England, there is not expected to be one at Stamford Bridge tonight. Chelsea get...

arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly made “fresh contact” with a high-profile attacker who’s on their transfer radar. When you examine the current Blues squad, there’s real quality...

arts.ttl: Who is Tyrique George? The exciting Chelsea academy prospect expected to play against Barrow
arts.sum: Will Tyrique George start against Barrow tonight?

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca makes brutal Ben Chilwell admission as England star set to come in from cold
arts.sum: Ben Chilwell is set to make his first Chelsea start since March when they take on League Two leaders Barrow in the Carabaou Cup, but Enzo Maresca admits it will be a rare appearance

arts.ttl: 'You need to': Enzo Maresca says £80k-a-week star must adapt to being a Chelsea player
arts.sum: 'It is just a matter of adapting a little bit but I don’t have any doubts.'

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Carabao Cup preview: Chilwell set for Chelsea return vs Barrow
arts.sum: Head coach Enzo Maresca last week announced the situation had changed and now plans to name Chilwell in his matchday squad for the third-round cup tie after welcoming him back into first-team training. “He will be in the squad tomorrow and hopefully we can give him some minutes.”

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard's touching gesture recalled by Barrow boss after death of legendary dad
arts.sum: Stephen Clemence will take his Barrow side to Stamford Bridge to face Chelsea in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday night - and he's recalled a touching moment with Blues legend Frank Lampard after the death of his father

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Barrow: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea are aiming to continue their impressive start to the season when they take on Barrow in the third round of the Carabao Cup on Tuesday night. Chelsea predicted lineup vs Barrow (4-2-3-1) : Jorgensen; Disasi, Tosin, Badiashile, Veiga; Caicedo, Dewsbury-Hall; Neto, Felix, Mudryk; Nkunku.
